info.shortName: F/m US Treasury 3 Month Bill Fu
info.longName: F/m US Treasury 3 Month Bill Fund - ETF Class Shares

funds_data.description: Under normal market conditions, F/m Investments LLC (the “Adviser”) seeks to achieve the fund’s investment objective by investing at least 80% of the fund’s net assets (plus any borrowings for investment purposes) in the component securities of the underlying index. The index is comprised of a single issue purchased at the beginning of the month and held for a full month.
